Index.title: Robotics Research Club of CTUST
Index.description: The CTUST Robotics Club is a student-led community dedicated to the art of building robots. Our platform provides members with a hands-on learning space to explore technology, share resources, and turn creative ideas into reality.
Index.schoolName: Central Taiwan University of Science and Technology

subtitles.1: We are a hands-on hub where
subtitles.3: to craft the possibilities of tomorrow.

OurMission.title: Our Mission
OurMission.description: We are here to champion robotics and empower students through hands-on experience, logical thinking, and teamwork. We strive to create an open, shared space where members don’t just refine their skills—they learn how to tackle the world's most complex problems, together.

CoreProjects.title: Core Projects
CoreProjects.description: We layer our technologies, striving for excellence at every level.

web.title: Web Platform
web.subtitle: Full-stack Development
web.desc: A modern portal built on React & Next.js. Beyond a showcase, it represents our commitment to front-end tech and design aesthetics.

mentor.title: Robot Mentor
mentor.subtitle: Beginner Wheeled Robot
mentor.desc: An entry-level wheeled robot designed for our curriculum. Its modular design helps members master sensors, motor drivers, and Arduino logic.

pathfinder.title: Robot Pathfinder
pathfinder.subtitle: Pro Competition Project
pathfinder.desc: A high-performance machine built for precision. Developed independently by our core team to push the limits of speed and control.

ios.title: iOS App
ios.subtitle: Native Application
ios.desc: Built natively with SwiftUI. It integrates club calendars and check-in systems, serving as the core of our digital transformation.

0.title: Hands-on Focus
0.description: We don't just talk. Every member gets to solder circuits, code, and build hardware, turning ideas into reality.

1.title: Team Spirit
1.description: Building robots is a team effort. You'll learn communication, collaboration, and how to tackle challenges together.

2.title: Cross-disciplinary
2.description: We welcome students from all fields—IT, Healthcare, Marketing, and more. Diverse perspectives spark the most creative solutions.

0.title: General Meeting & Orientation
0.description: The first session of our club starts with getting to know each other. We introduce the mission, bylaws, and future plans, guide members through the website's features, and complete interest-based grouping to lay a solid foundation for upcoming hands-on courses.

1.title: Robot Hardware Assembly
1.description: The first large-scale hands-on event. Starting from individual components, members assemble the robot car's structure and connect circuits based on schematics, experiencing the creative process of turning parts into a complete robot.

2.title: Robot Programming
2.description: After hardware assembly, we breathe life into the robot. Starting from Arduino IDE installation, members learn to read sensor values and write logic to make the robot car truly move.

3.title: Robotics Competition
3.description: The club's first internal competition combined with an on-site workshop. Officers explain core algorithms, and members adjust code and familiarize themselves with the track on the spot before robots attempt to navigate the map autonomously.

News.title: News
News.description: The latest news from the Robotics Research Club of CTUST, including club activities, technical sharing, competition information, and more.
